sampleRows.description: The sample uses lung cancer as an example, saying lung cancer is only 10% heritable and most cases are associated with lifestyle factors such as smoking.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample states that 'Your Risk' is only for the heritable component of the disease, and that environmental, lifestyle, and other non-heritable factors also affect overall susceptibility risk.
sampleRows.sourceBindingNote: Extracted from the public Sequencing.com Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample PDF; used here as sibling output-structure evidence for Kidneys and Urinary Tract DNA Health Report, not as a direct Kidneys and Urinary Tract DNA Health Report sample report or local kidney-disease output structure, CKD diagnosis, kidney risk, kidney-function inference, urinary-tract status, diet, medication, supplement, screening, testing, treatment, or actionability guidance.

sampleRows.description: Several rows such as Hyperparathyroidism, Inguinal Hernia, Non-alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease, Peripheral Axonal Neuropathy, and Pulmonary Fibrosis are visible with descriptions or lifetime-risk text but no clear extracted Your Risk label.
